hooks.command: cd "C:/Users/sg/Documents/GitHub/santoshgdev/recipes" && if git status --short | grep -q .; then RECIPE=$(git status --short | grep 'data/' | grep '.json' | head -1 | sed 's/.*data\///' | sed 's/\.json//'); MSG="${RECIPE:-update recipes}"; git add -A && git commit -m "add $MSG" && git push origin main; fi
